7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-212", "name": "Improper Removal of Sensitive Information Before Storage or Transfer"}], "description": "## Summary

config.get redaction bypass through sourceConfig and runtimeConfig aliases.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.14`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.14`

## Impact

An authenticated gateway client with config read access could receive unredacted secrets through alias fields that survived redaction, including provider API keys, gateway auth material, and channel credentials.

## Technical Details

The fix explicitly overwrites `sourceConfig` and `runtimeConfig` with the same redacted copies used for `resolved` and `config`, including the invalid-snapshot branch. Tests now cover both alias fields.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #66030. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.14`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `86734ef93a2f25063371b04f1946eb300548acd4`
- PR: #66030

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.14 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00333, "percentile": 0.24935}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:47:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43528"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:47:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/66030", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/86734ef93a2f25063371b04f1946eb300548acd4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: config.get redaction bypass through sourceConfig and runtimeConfig aliases", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:56:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8372-7vhw-cm6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.14", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.14"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
